<p class="key-answer" data-question="Rotigotine 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Rotigotine</strong> 目前有 <strong>13 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Rotigotine 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Parkinson's disease: Neupro is indicated for the treatment of the signs and symptoms of early-stage idiopathic Parkinson's disease as monotherapy (i.e. without levodopa) or in combination with...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L2</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>attention deficit-hyperactivity disorder（100.0%）</li>
<li>schizophrenia（100.0%）</li>
<li>polymicrogyria, perisylvian, with cerebellar hypoplasia and arthrogryposis（100.0%）</li>
<li>faciodigitogenital syndrome（100.0%）</li>
<li>congenital disorder of glycosylation with defective fucosylation（100.0%）</li>
<li>retinal dystrophy with or without extraocular anomalies（100.0%）</li>
<li>myopia X-linked（100.0%）</li>
<li>atypical glycine encephalopathy（100.0%）</li>
<li>Charcot-Marie-Tooth disease, demyelinating, type 1G（100.0%）</li>
<li>myopia 26, X-linked, female-limited（100.0%）</li>
<li>syndromic myopia（100.0%）</li>
<li>hydranencephaly (disease)（100.0%）</li>
<li>attention deficit hyperactivity disorder, inattentive type（100.0%）</li>
<li>juvenile onset Parkinson disease 19A（100.0%）</li>
<li>chondromyxoid fibroma（100.0%）</li>
<li>specific developmental disorder（99.9%）</li>
<li>hereditary late onset Parkinson disease（99.9%）</li>
<li>atypical juvenile parkinsonism（99.9%）</li>
<li>trichotillomania（99.9%）</li>
<li>PLA2G6-associated neurodegeneration（99.9%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>

</div>
